title: The Government of Bangladesh (Services) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1975
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Government of Bangladesh (Services) Order, 1972. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Government of Bangladesh (Services) Order, 1972 (P.O.

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Government of Bangladesh (Services) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1975 .

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of P.O. No. 9 of 1972
provisions.content: 2. The Government of Bangladesh (Services) Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 9 of 1972), is hereby repealed.
